name: Manchester
description: Manchester's real estate market remains competitive with tight inventory. The North End continues to see strong appreciation, while the West Side offers multi-family cash-flow opportunities. High demand makes fast pre-approval essential.

name: Nashua
description: Nashua is a very hot market characterized by high demand and limited inventory. Homes frequently sell above listing price. Being prepared with pre-approvals and understanding non-negotiable priorities is crucial.

name: Concord
description: Concord features a steady, seller-driven market. Its relatively accessible median prices compared to Southern NH make it attractive, though inventory remains lean, sustaining firm home values.
